Argonaut.install: brew tap darksworm/homebrew-tap && brew install darksworm/homebrew-tap/argonaut

BrogueCE.install: git clone https://github.com/tmewett/BrogueCE.git && cd BrogueCE && make bin/brogue

C-Edit.install: git clone https://github.com/velorek1/c-edit.git && cd c-edit/src && make

Caligula.install: brew tap philocalyst/tap && brew install caligula

Captain's log.install: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make && sudo make install

CoreFreq.install: git clone https://github.com/cyring/CoreFreq.git && cd CoreFreq && make -j && make install

HydroToDo.install: git clone https://github.com/Henriquehnnm/hydrotodo.git && cd hydrotodo && python3 hydrotodo.py

ID-Spoofer.install: curl -sL https://github.com/NubleX/ID-Spoofer/releases/latest/download/idspoof_linux_amd64 -o idspoof && chmod +x idspoof && sudo mv idspoof /usr/local/bin/

Kyanos.install: tar xvf kyanos_vx.x.x_linux_amd64.tar.gz && sudo mv kyanos /usr/local/bin/

LogLens.install: brew tap Caelrith/loglens && brew install loglens

Maze TUI.install: git clone https://github.com/agl-alexglopez/maze-tui.git && cd maze-tui/maze_tui && cargo build --release --bin run_tui

Micro Snake.install: git clone https://github.com/troglobit/snake && cd snake && make && sudo install -m 755 snake /usr/local/bin/snake

Superhighway84.install: git clone git@github.com:mrusme/superhighway84.git && cd superhighway84 && go build .

Toutui.install: bash -c 'expected_sha256="b5c41bcd3c480fd2ca6ec0031ccecf2cf7cf4ae01f591cad64a320fa7d72331d" export expected_sha256 tmpfile=$(mktemp) && curl -LsSf https://github.com/AlbanDAVID/Toutui/raw/stable/hello_toutui.sh -o "$tmpfile" && bash "$tmpfile" install && rm -f "$tmpfile"'

Zoridor.install: git clone https://github.com/ringtailsoftware/zoridor && cd zoridor && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe && sudo cp zig-out/bin/zoridor /usr/local/bin/zoridor

amtui.install: brew tap pehlicd/tap && brew install amtui

amux.install: brew tap andyrewlee/amux && brew install amux

awkaster.install: brew install gawk && git clone https://github.com/TheMozg/awk-raycaster && cd awk-raycaster && gawk -f awkaster.awk

botany.install: git clone https://github.com/jifunks/botany.git && cd botany && python3 botany.py

brows.install: brew tap rubysolo/tools && brew install brows

catalyst.install: brew tap PraveenGongada/tap && brew install catalyst

cruise.install: brew tap cruise-org/homebrew-tap && brew install --cask cruise

ctune.install: git clone https://github.com/An7ar35/ctune.git && cd ctune && cmake . -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . && sudo cmake --install .

ec2-instance-selector.install: brew tap aws/tap && brew install ec2-instance-selector

eilmeldung.install: brew tap christo-auer/eilmeldung https://github.com/christo-auer/eilmeldung && brew install eilmeldung

eks-node-viewer.install: brew tap aws/tap && brew install eks-node-viewer

elinks.install: meson setup builddir && cd builddir && meson compile && meson install

fast-resume.install: brew tap angristan/tap && brew install fast-resume

fml.install: git clone https://github.com/wick3dr0se/fml && cd fml && cp fml /usr/local/bin

fnf.install: git clone https://github.com/leo-arch/fnf && cd fnf && make && sudo make install

git-scope.install: brew tap Bharath-code/tap && brew install git-scope

instagram-cli.install: brew tap supreme-gg-gg/tap && brew install instagram-cli

kabmat.install: git clone https://github.com/PlankCipher/kabmat.git && cd kabmat && make && sudo make install

kdash.install: brew tap kdash-rs/kdash && brew install kdash

kilo.install: git clone https://github.com/antirez/kilo.git && cd kilo && make && sudo cp kilo /usr/local/bin/

lazytrivy.install: brew tap owenrumney/tools && brew install lazytrivy

levite.install: git clone https://github.com/RauliL/levite.git && cd levite && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && make

logradar.install: git clone https://github.com/nanook72/logradar && cd logradar && cargo install --path .

maki.install: git clone https://git.sr.ht/~bscit/maki && cd maki && dotnet build && ./maki/bin/Debug/net8.0/maki

managarr.install: brew tap Dark-Alex-17/managarr && brew install managarr

markln.install: git clone https://github.com/xqtr/markln && cd markln && pip install -r requirements.txt && python markln.py

marstui-audio.install: git clone https://github.com/schooldanlp6/marstui-rustio && cd marstui-rustio && cargo build --release && sudo cp target/release/marstui-audio /usr/local/bin/

matterhorn.install: curl -L https://github.com/matterhorn-chat/matterhorn/releases/download/90000.1.1/matterhorn-90000.1.1-Darwin-arm64.tar.bz2 -o matterhorn.tar.bz2 && tar -xjf matterhorn.tar.bz2 && sudo mv matterhorn-90000.1.1-Darwin-arm64/matterhorn /usr/local/bin/matterhorn

nchat.install: brew tap d99kris/nchat && brew install nchat

nino.install: git clone https://github.com/evanlin96069/nino.git && cd nino && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build . && cmake --install .

nostratui.install: git clone https://github.com/adamm-xyz/nostratui.git && cd nostratui && cargo build

ntc.install: git clone https://codeberg.org/ItsZariep/ntc && cd ntc/src && make

numr.install: brew tap nasedkinpv/tap && brew install numr

pass-cli.install: brew tap arimxyer/homebrew-tap && brew install pass-cli

pipe-viewer.install: perl Build.PL && sudo ./Build installdeps && sudo ./Build install

pond.install: git clone https://gitlab.com/alice-lefebvre/pond/ && cd pond && make && sudo make install

rttt.install: git clone https://gitlab.com/BlackEdder/rttt.git && cd rttt && cmake . && make install

sfm.install: git clone https://github.com/afify/sfm && cd sfm && make && make install

sssnake.install: git clone https://github.com/AngelJumbo/sssnake.git && cd sssnake && make && sudo make install

sweeper.install: git clone https://github.com/igor47/sweeper && cd sweeper && uv run sweeper.py

tblogs.install: brew tap ezeoleaf/tap && brew install tblogs

term.everything.install: cd /tmp && curl -L https://github.com/mmulet/term.everything/releases/download/0.7.8/term.everything.mmulet.com-dont_forget_to_chmod_+x_this_file -o term.everything && chmod +x term.everything && sudo mv term.everything /usr/local/bin/

termrex.install: git clone https://github.com/SATYADAHAL/termrex.git && cd termrex && make -j release && ./build/termrex

tinytetris.install: git clone https://github.com/taylorconor/tinytetris && cd tinytetris && make

tui-shop.install: git clone https://github.com/Gcat101/tui-shop.git && cd tui-shop && chmod +x ./install.sh && sudo ./install.sh

tuix.install: git clone https://github.com/pythops/tuix && cd tuix && cargo install --path .

tvterm.install: git clone --recursive https://github.com/magiblot/tvterm && cd tvterm && cmake . -B ./build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build ./build

wb.install: git clone https://github.com/MertGunduz/wb.git && cd wb && chmod 755 INSTALL.sh && ./INSTALL.sh

wocogo.install: git clone https://codeberg.org/kedlubnowski/wocogo.git && cd wocogo && pip install .

wttr.in.install: git clone https://github.com/chubin/wttr.in && cd wttr.in && bash build.sh build

ytfzf.install: git clone https://github.com/pystardust/ytfzf && cd ytfzf && sudo make install doc

ytui-music.install: git clone https://github.com/sudipghimire533/ytui-music && cd ytui-music && git submodule init && MPV_BUILD=mpv-build/ cargo build --all --release --features build_libmpv
